user_question: Show me 10 customers from São Paulo
generated_sql:
SELECT customer_id, customer_city, customer_state
FROM customers
WHERE customer_city = 'são paulo'
LIMIT 10;

user_question: Show me 10 customers from Sao Paulo
generated_sql:
SELECT customer_id, customer_city, customer_state
FROM customers
WHERE LOWER(customer_city) = 'sao paulo'
LIMIT 10;

user_question: How many orders were placed in January 2025?
generated_sql:
SELECT COUNT(order_id)
FROM orders
WHERE EXTRACT(MONTH FROM order_purchase_timestamp) = 1
  AND EXTRACT(YEAR FROM order_purchase_timestamp) = 2025;

user_question: What was the total revenue in 2025?
generated_sql: SELECT ROUND(SUM(oi.price + oi.freight_value)::numeric,2) as total_revenue FROM order_items oi JOIN orders o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id WHERE EXTRACT(YEAR FROM o.order_purchase_timestamp) = 2025;

user_question: Show me average order value by state
generated_sql:
SELECT c.customer_state, AVG(op.payment_value) AS average_order_value
FROM orders o
JOIN order_payments op ON o.order_id = op.order_id
JOIN customers c ON o.customer_id = c.customer_id
GROUP BY c.customer_state
LIMIT 100;

SELECT ROUND(SUM(oi.price + oi.freight_value)::numeric, 2) AS total_sales

LIMIT 100;

user_question: Which customers left 5-star reviews and spent more than 500 total

GROUP BY c.customer_id, c.customer_city, c.customer_state
HAVING SUM(op.payment_value) > 500
LIMIT 100;

user_question: Which customers left 5-star reviews and spent more than 500 total
generated_sql:
SELECT
  c.customer_id,
  c.customer_city,
  SUM(oi.price + oi.freight_value) AS total_spent
FROM customers AS c
JOIN orders AS o
  ON c.customer_id = o.customer_id
JOIN order_items AS oi
  ON o.order_id = oi.order_id
JOIN order_reviews AS r
  ON o.order_id = r.order_id
WHERE
  r.review_score = 5
GROUP BY
  c.customer_id,
  c.customer_city
HAVING
  SUM(oi.price + oi.freight_value) > 500
LIMIT 100;
